strategy: Hit with Ice; he takes +5% and resists Fire 50%.
Enter on time; a late wizard eats Grand Phoenix.
He runs an interrupt cycle casting either a helpful Good Heads buff or a harmful Bad Heads spell on your whole team, so keep a heal ready for the bad rolls.
He applies a +25% Mass Fire Trap and a +40% Fireblade after his natural attack, so expect his damage to ramp; shield and set up over a couple Rounds.
Stack Ice blades and Feint, then end with one Ice hit.
cheatNotes: Joining late gets Grand Phoenix cast on you; enter with the group.
On some turns he buffs the whole enemy side with a helpful spell; expect his side to get stronger periodically.
On other turns he hits your whole team with a harmful spell; keep a team heal or shields up for it.
